/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/MainGUI.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/MainGUI.dir/MainGUI_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MainGUI.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MainGUI.dir/mainwindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MainGUI.dir/schedulerUi/schedulerWindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MainGUI.dir/filesystemUi/filesystemWindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MainGUI.dir/filesystemUi/bufferCacheWidget.cpp.o -o MainGUI  /usr/lib/libQt6Widgets.so.6.10.1 /usr/lib/libQt6Sql.so.6.10.1 -lsqlite3 /usr/lib/libQt6Gui.so.6.10.1 /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.10.1
